<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/dataset/versions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a list of dataset programs for a specific program, version type, start date and stop date

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","title":"DatasetVersionListInput_ReportView"}}},"description":"The input for the dataset version list","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

the given program ID already retrieval of the dataset"}}}
>
